name: Snickers Bar Brownies (Very Good)
recipeIngredient: 1 Large bag Snickers -OR- Milky Way Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix with melted margarine and condensed milk.
2. Spread half of the mixture into a 9x13" pan and bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Slice the candy bars into small pieces.
4. Lay the pieces on top of the baked crust, using the remaining crumbly texture as desired.
5. Place the pan back in the oven and bake at 350°F for an additional 20 minutes.
